que: What is the primary purpose of the SimpleDialog widget in Flutter?
options: To display a simple Material Design dialog

que: SimpleDialog is commonly used for:
Which function is typically used to display a SimpleDialog?
Which widget is used for each selectable option inside a SimpleDialog?
Which parameter of SimpleDialog defines the title of the dialog?
Which parameter of SimpleDialog defines the options or main content?
Which parameter sets the background color of a SimpleDialog?
Which parameter controls the shape of the SimpleDialog?
Which of the following is a recommended use for SimpleDialog?
Which widget is recommended to use for each option inside a SimpleDialog?
Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with SimpleDialog?
options: Using for complex content; prefer AlertDialog or custom dialog

que: What should you not forget when using SimpleDialog for selections?
According to the class definition, SimpleDialog extends which base class?
What is the default value of the children parameter in SimpleDialog?
Which parameter controls the padding around the dialog’s content in SimpleDialog?
What is the default value of contentPadding in SimpleDialog?
Which parameter controls the padding between the dialog and the edges of the screen?
What is the default value of insetPadding in SimpleDialog?
Which parameter can be used to provide an accessible label for the SimpleDialog?
Which parameter controls how the dialog’s content is clipped in SimpleDialog?
What is the default clipBehavior for SimpleDialog?
Which parameter allows customizing the text style of the SimpleDialog title?
Which parameter in SimpleDialog controls the padding around the title widget?
Which of these is a good use case for SimpleDialog instead of AlertDialog?
options: Confirmation with OK and Cancel buttons
Simple list of options for the user to choose from
